outlook_paragraph: EOG Resources shows limited satellite-detected drilling activity with only one active site at decision date, reflecting a 50% drop in relative activity compared to recent trends. This contraction, combined with a modest realized price discount and less than half exposure to the targeted segment, suggests constrained production growth into Q4 2022. Despite stable WTI prices near $78.75/bbl, the weak drilling signal aligns with a revenue forecast of approximately $5.54B, below the consensus anchor. Activity appears concentrated on legacy pads with no new sites activated recently.
